agents.name: node-internal-api
agents.description: APIs for task-management and client-management apps, auto-dispatcher logic and APIs. Most DB interactions are read-only (not write).

agents.name: phytoweb-ruby
agents.description: Core backend — main Phytech backend owning all DB schemas, migrations, and model logic. Handles most inserts and updates. The source of truth for DB schema, model relationships, and configuration data.

agents.name: internal-tools
agents.description: Monorepo with two internal web apps: (1) Task-Management — dispatchers view, edit, create, and manage tasks, dispatch work, view actions and issues (alerts), includes the AI auto-dispatcher mode. (2) Client-Management — batch configuration management across all Phytech operations.

agents.name: manage-clients
agents.description: Client management app (standalone) — batch configuration management across all Phytech operations, agricultural client monitoring, map-based field visualization, and client configuration.
